message:
fix(test): fix global_returns_none_after_reset race in proptest_chaos

OnceLock doesn't support removal, so reset_global() only clears faults
rather than removing the global injector. When tests run in parallel,
init_global() from another test can set the global before the assertion,
causing a spurious failure.

Renamed to global_cleared_after_reset and updated to check that the
injector (if present) has zero fired faults after reset.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
